enroll.title: Ready to meet your friends?
enroll.subtitle: Before we start, we need your parent's permission. Enter their email address and we'll send them a message!
enroll.approvalNotFound: No request found. Send a new request above.
enroll.privacyNote: 🔒 We only use this to ask for permission. Nothing else!

waiting.title: Message sent! 🎉
waiting.subtitle: We sent your parent an email. As soon as they say yes, Migo will come to life!
waiting.waitingFor: Waiting for your parent to tap "Yes"…

celebration.title: Your parent said YES!! 🥳
celebration.subtitle: Time to set up your Migo! Go find your parent — you'll need them for the first few steps!
celebration.parentNote: Your child's account is approved. The next few steps need you — grab the device and let's get started together!

basics.title: Tell us about your child
basics.subtitle: Parents — fill this in with your child sitting with you.
basics.specialNeedsLabel: My child has special needs or learning differences
basics.specialNeedsDesc: Dyslexia, ADHD, autism spectrum, pre-reader, motor needs, and more
basics.preReaderDesc: Enables Read to me mode automatically — the app will speak everything aloud

needs.title: Any special needs?
needs.subtitle: Helps us tune the experience. Select all that apply — changeable anytime.

photo.title: Create {{name}}'s look
photo.subtitle: Your child can watch and help pick their theme!
photo.uploadDesc: Turned into a cartoon — real photo deleted immediately
photo.buildDesc: Choose hair, eyes, skin tone and accessories
photo.skipDesc: Use a default avatar — set it up later
photo.privacyNote: 🔒 The real photo is used only to generate the cartoon and is permanently deleted right after.

mascot.title: Pick your guide!
mascot.tapToHear: 🔊 Tap to hear what to do!

interests.title: Just for {{name}}!
interests.freeTextPlaceholder: Type something you love… or tap the mic to say it!

personality.title: Just for {{name}}!
personality.migaBubble: Now I want to get to know the REAL you! These help me find friends who truly get you 🌟
personality.q1: In a group of friends, you are usually...
personality.q1_quiet_desc: I listen more than I talk
personality.q2: When something goes wrong you usually...
personality.q3: Your friends would say you are...
personality.q5: When you meet someone new you feel...
personality.q5_nervous_desc: I need time to warm up
personality.freeTextLabel: Anything else Miga should know about you? 🌟
personality.freeTextSub: Your favourite show, something special about you, anything!
personality.freeTextPlaceholder: Tell Miga something special about you... (totally optional!)

packs.sketchCrewDesc: Illustrated portraits, like a comic book
packs.animalGangDesc: Every friend is a fun animal character

friends.title: A surprise! 🎁
friends.subtitle: I found 3 friends who match you perfectly, {{name}}!
friends.tryDifferent: Not feeling it? Try different friends →
friends.confirmRegen: Are you sure? You'll meet 2 new friends but say goodbye to these.
friends.regenMaxed: You've met all the best matches for you! 🌟

allset.title: You're all set, {{name}}! 🎊
allset.subtitle: {{mascot}} and {{friend}} are already waiting for you!
allset.parentNoteDesc: You can see everything {{name}} does, manage friends, set screen time limits, and get instant safety alerts — anytime.

feed.emptyTitle: Your friends are preparing their first posts... 🌟

friends.noFriendsYet: Complete onboarding to meet your first friends!

profile.title: My Profile

friends.empty: Complete onboarding to meet your first friends!

memories.empty: Your memories will appear here as you use Migo!

settings.title: Settings ⚙️
settings.signOutConfirm: Are you sure? You'll need to sign in again.

profile.avatarTapMessage: Ask a parent to change your photo 👨‍👩‍👧
